title: varthemia candicans
intro: Varthemia candicans, also known as Western Yarrow, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to North America and Europe. It has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Varthemia candicans include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues, as well as promoting wound healing and relieving respiratory problems. Varthemia candicans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
